channel.title: 2026-02-26 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-02-26 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Interaction-Driven Quantum Phase Transitions between Topological and Crystalline Orders of Electrons
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. X
👤 André Haug, Ravi Kumar, Tomer Firon, Misha Yutushui, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, David F. Mross, and Yuval Ronen
Author(s): André Haug, Ravi Kumar, Tomer Firon, Misha Yutushui, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, David F. Mross, and Yuval Ronen Electric-field-tunable Landau-level orbital composition in bilayer graphene provides a mechanism for stabilizing electron crystals and driving transitions into exotic topological liquid states. [Phys. Rev. X 16, 011039] Published Thu Feb 26, 2026

item.title: Quantum Theory of Fractional Topological Pumping of Lattice Solitons
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. X
👤 Julius Bohm, Hugo Gerlitz, Christina Jörg, and Michael Fleischhauer
Author(s): Julius Bohm, Hugo Gerlitz, Christina Jörg, and Michael Fleischhauer Self-bound many-particle objects (solitons) in topological pumps exhibit transitions between integer and fractional transport phases, controlled by interaction strength. [Phys. Rev. X 16, 011038] Published Thu Feb 26, 2026
